---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to PickySteve (Phase 1 scope applies)
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Is this in Phase 1 scope?**
PickySteve is deliberately Phase 1 (MVP) only — see the README's "Phase 1 non-goals"
(no knowledge-graph-as-default, no standing eval harness, no tracing platform, no
credential vault, no sandbox). If your request is one of those, please describe the
**real, observed failure** that justifies adding it now rather than later — that's the
bar for Phase 2 work here.

**Problem**
What's missing or awkward today, and who hits it (which agent/connector, which kind of
request).

**Proposed change**
What you'd add or change. If it touches routing quality (router, retrieval, reranker,
floor/dedupe, compat check), note that the trifecta eval suites will need to be
re-run before merge.

**Alternatives considered**
Anything else you thought about, and why you didn't propose it instead.
